articles.title: American Airlines brings grab-and-go lounge to New York's JFK - CNBC
Anthropic releases Claude Science, a product aimed at researchers, the pharma industry - statnews.com
articles.description: Anthropic released Claude Science, an application that optimizes its large language model for scientists and, especially, those doing research at pharma companies.

articles.title: Nike is set to report earnings after the bell. Here's what to expect - CNBC
articles.description: Nike is expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.

articles.title: Bessent warns gas stations 'we're watching' as Trump demands immediate price cuts - Fox Business
articles.description: Scott Bessent warns gasoline retailers the Trump administration is watching pump prices and expects them to pass crude oil savings to consumers.

articles.title: Amazon launches new $1 billion FDE org, following OpenAI and Anthropic - TechCrunch
articles.description: Engineers on the new team will embed within companies to deploy purpose-built agents, focusing on fast deployments and customer self-sufficiency.

articles.title: Visa, Stripe, Coinbase and more join Open USD stablecoin that shares reserve revenue - The Block
articles.description: Expected to launch later this year, Open Standard said businesses will be able to mint and redeem Open USD without fees or volume limits.

articles.title: Exclusive: FDA allows ZYN to sell pouches on health benefits - Axios
articles.description: The pouches can be marketed as less risky than cigarettes.

articles.title: US job openings were much higher than expected in May, shrugging off uncertainty from Iran war - CNN
articles.description: Good news for job seekers: The number of available positions in the United States increased for the second month in a row.

articles.title: Ford recalling more than 741,00 vehicles because of park system issue - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
articles.description: Ford is recalling more than 741,000 vehicles in the U.S. because a transmission issue may damage the park system, which could increase the risk of a crash or injury

articles.title: SMCI Stock: Dell Could Get a Boost From Latest Super Micro Raid - Barron's
articles.description: SMCI stock tumbled after Taiwanese investigators raided the company's offices. Dell stock climbed.

articles.title: BP deputy chief to leave company in latest upheaval at oil major - Financial Times
articles.description: Carol Howle, the trading chief appointed deputy CEO less than three months ago, is set to retire

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro ‘drop test’ leaks get yanked from X - The Verge
articles.description: At least one X account that posted videos supposedly showing the iPhone 18 Pro undergoing a drop test has been suspended from the platform, after a data breach at an Apple supplier reportedly leaked info on the upcoming phone.

articles.title: Comcast Split Shows Bigger Is No Longer Seen As Better In The Media Business - Deadline
articles.description: Comcast's plan to split into two smaller companies may mark the unofficial end of "all under one roof" consolidation in media.

articles.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq waver after record-setting session - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: Investors assessed a remarkable run-up in chip stocks in the first half of the year and the dollar's growing strength.

articles.title: Judge refuses to dismiss state AGs' Meta child addiction lawsuit - Yahoo
articles.description: A federal judge in Oakland let most claims stand, ruling Meta's platform design practices plausibly constitute unfair conduct under consumer protection law
